title: EDISHINE Bedside Table Lamp, Blue Velvet Lampshade, 15 Inch Small Table Lamp for Living Room, Modern Nightstand Lamps for Bedroom, Black Metal Base, 4W E27 2700K LED Bulb Included
features: [Modern Style Table Lamp] This modern bedroom lamp bedside features clean lines and a sleek metal finish paired with a soft velvet lampshade, creating a perfect balance of style and warmth; the minimalist lamp enhances the aesthetic of your bedroom, living room, or study

[Soft Velvet Lampshade] The velvet fabric lampshade of the modern table lamp diffuses light evenly, producing a soft and inviting glow; cozy for bedside reading or as a nightstand lamp, it creates a relaxing ambiance that helps you unwind and drift into restful sleep

[Durable Metal Base] Built with a sturdy metal frame and heavy-duty base, this small nightstand lamp ensures long-lasting durability and stability; the high-quality construction resists daily wear, offering you reliable and consistent lighting without frequent replacements

[Easy Assembly Bedside Lamp] Designed for less hassle setup, this small bedside lamp requires no tools for assembly; simply connect the lamp body to the base, screw in the bulb, and enjoy instant lighting; perfect for beginners and quick room makeovers

[Includes LED Bulb] The minimalist table lamp comes with a 4W E27 LED bulb (2700K warm light), providing no-flicker, eye-friendly illumination; energy-efficient and long-lasting, the included bulb saves you the trouble of choosing a compatible
description: Product Description Velvet lampshade table lamp can bring warmth and comfort to the space, creating a warm and relaxing home atmosphere. Previous page Next page 1 For living room 2 For desk 3 For bedroom Product Feature Velvet lampshade Velvet lampshades can provide soft and uniform light, effectively avoid glare, create a warm and retro atmosphere, and are also suitable as decorative elements of home aesthetics. Included bulb The bedside lamp includes an E27 LED energy-saving bulb, which has low energy consumption and a long service life, and no additional purchase is required. Modern style table lamp adopts simple lines and fashionable colors, which can be well integrated into various modern home styles and enhance the beauty of the space. Warm Christmas Decorations Light up the Christmas Eve with table lamps, letting their warm glow fill every corner. How light-transmitting is a velvet lampshade? The velvet lampshade of this table lamp has an optimized thickness. When paired with the included warm LED bulb, light filters through the velvet, creating a soft, diffused glow that evenly covers the space. Can it be adapted to different modern home decor styles? This table lamp's minimalist design complements the freshness of Nordic style, the sophistication of light luxury, and is also well-suited to industrial and minimalist environments. Do velvet lampshades easily attract dust and appear dirty? Due to the fuzzy structure of velvet, it does attract light dust more easily than ordinary fabric. Use a soft-bristled brush to gently sweep away dust in the direction of the fuzz, avoiding rubbing that could cause the fuzz to shift.
